dialogues.text: Alright. Here we go. True Grit is a young woman's quest for justice and an equal place in an unfair world. Mattie Ross's idyllic childhood in Arkansas is shattered when her father is robbed and brutally murdered by the craven outlaw Tom Chaney. Mattie, at just 14 years of age travels to Fort Smith to reclaim her father's body, set his affairs aright and hire someone to track down and capture Chaney. She settles on Reuben "Rooster" Cogburn, a drunk trigger happy Marshal and convinces him to take her case. Heading into Choctaw country, they encounter a stream of scoundrels, thieves, miscreants, and the arrogant Texas Ranger LaBoeuf. Will they succeed in tracking down Chaney and the crew he's thrown in with and deliver justice? And will they prove that they do in fact, have True Grit?
